EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The configuration "{object.name}" failed to pass the check for compliance with the rule "{subject.name}" on host {src.host}
The rule "{object.name}" had failed on host {src.host}. Reason: {reason}
The configuration "{object.name}" is checked for compliance with the rule "{subject.name}" on host {src.host}
Failed to start checking the configuration "{object.name}" for compliance with the rule "{subject.name}" on host {src.host}. Reason: {reason}
The rule "{object.name}" is checked to extract information from the object "{datafield10}" on host {src.host}
